title: Unnale Unnale Lyrics Osthi Osthe Songs lyrics
stanzas:
Singer: Thaman S, Rita
Song: Unnale Unnale
Music: Thaman S
Movie: Osthi
Lyrics: Yuga Bharathi

Ae Unnale Unnale..
Suthudhadi boomi pandhu thannaale
Ae kannaala kannaala
ottuthadi vanavillu emmaela

Devadhaya kanavil aenginen appo
Unvaliyil theerudhe aekkamum ippo
Poomalaye maname maname appo
Unninaivu kuralaa serudhe ippo (Unnale Unnale..)

Iva mansasudhan perusudhan
unnaku idamundhaan kodujuraa
Un nenapudhaan kanavudhaan avana
nenachudhaan urugudhaan

Oh Aiyo Aiyo Theriyuma Kanavilae Kalaigira Veshamae..
Inge Sendru Mudiyumaa Thalumbiyae Vazhigira Naesamae..

Hey Enna Neeyum Paakalanaa,
Onnum Illa Aagaaram Illa..
Unna Paththi Paesalanaa,
Nanban illa naan kooda illave illa

Naal Poora Oora Naan Suththunaen Appo
Nee Sirika Unna Naan Suththaraen Ippo
Maatikitaa Ora Naa Thattuvaen Appo
Kaadhal Kitta Maatikiten Kathuraen Ippo (Unnale Unnale..)

Oh illai illai idhyame thozhaindhidum
dhinam unnai kaanave
Ingae ingae edhuvume therindhidum
kadavulai polave

Ae enna solla aedhu solla
ellaamume neeyaagi ninnen
Kathiyila kaayamilla aanaalum nee
sollaamal kollaamal kolla

Devadhaya kanavil aenginen appo
Unvaliyil theerudhe aekkamum ippo
Poomalaye maname koodume appo
Unninaivu kuralaa serudhe ippo

Naal Poora Oora Naan Suththunaen Appo
Nee Sirika Unna Naan Suththaraen Ippo
Maatikitaa Ora Naa Thattuvaen Appo
Kaadhal Kitta Maatikiten Kathuraen Ippo (Unnale Unnale..)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Unnale Unnale'?

The song 'Unnale Unnale' expresses the feelings of love and longing, capturing the essence of romantic moments.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie Osthi?

In Osthi, the song plays during a romantic sequence, highlighting the chemistry between the lead characters.

Who are the singers and music director of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Rita and Thaman S, with music composed by Thaman S himself.

When was 'Unnale Unnale' released?

'Unnale Unnale' was released on October 19, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Osthi, the song Unnale Unnale serves as a celebration of love and connection between the protagonists. The upbeat melody and lively lyrics evoke feelings of joy and excitement, making it a perfect anthem for romantic occasions. The collaboration between Rita and Thaman S brings a unique charm to the track, enhancing its appeal. Overall, the song encapsulates the essence of youthful romance, leaving listeners with a sense of happiness and nostalgia.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Unnale Unnale from Osthi is a vibrant duet that captures the essence of youthful romance. With the enchanting voices of Rita and Thaman S, this track is a delightful blend of catchy melodies and heartfelt lyrics. Experience the magic of love through this energetic composition that will surely lift your spirits!
stanzaMeanings: Oh, you, you... The earth spins around because of you. Oh, with your eyes, the sky is shining brightly.
In my dreams, I saw God, and now I can't find peace in my heart. Oh, my mind is filled with flowers, and now your thoughts are coming together.
She is very thoughtful and has a place for you. My memories are like dreams, and he is thinking of me.
Oh, oh, do you know? In dreams, it feels like a disguise. Can I come here and rest, like a path that leads me?
Hey, are you also watching? There’s nothing, no place. If I talk about you, I have no friends, and I am alone.
I roam around the town for days. When you smile, I feel like I am shining. Now, I will change my ways, and I will make love change too.
Oh no, no, every day I worship you. Here, nothing is clear, like a god.
Oh, what can I say? You are everything, but you don’t have a hold on me. Even if you don’t say anything, I can’t ignore it.
In my dreams, I saw God, and now I can't find peace in my heart. Oh, my mind is filled with flowers, and now your thoughts are coming together.
I roam around the town for days. When you smile, I feel like I am shining. Now, I will change my ways, and I will make love change too.
